docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2020 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,520.89 FILED BY BARGER, JOHN WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT GRABR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARGER, JOHN WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRABR $7,520.89 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,690.89 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $95.00 - SERVED JUN-12-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GRABR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-16-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-16-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF JOHN WILLIAM BARGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GRABR IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE NO FEE STATED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARGER, JOHN WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT GRABR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-16-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 (W. TRUPEK 506)
